title: <ul class="Apple-dash-list">
content:
• List Metaformeme, Mythology, Wave Theory, Storytelling
  • List Technical Components (Red - Technical)
    • Procedural Generation
    • Self-Evolving OS Components
    • AI Workflow Automation
  • Organize Project Implementation (Green - Organizational)
    • Digital Memory Archive
    • GitHub Project Structure
    • Naming Conventions
  • Finalize Handoff Context (Mixed Colors)
    • Purpose of output
    • Constraints and dependencies
    • Continuity for iteration
  • Follow Recommended Prompt Flow
    • Objective → Concepts → Technicals → Organization → Constraints → Output

    Color-Coded Legend

    • Blue → Conceptual/Thematic Steps (Vision and Ideas)
    • Red → Technical/Procedural Steps (Execution and Systems)
